title: cymopterus evertii
intro: Cymopterus evertii, also known as Evert's desert parsley or Evert's licorice root, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its carminative and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cymopterus evertii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory congestion, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Cymopterus evertii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
